titleStmt.title: SII 34.61: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 61. Kāmarasavalli, Udaiyarpalayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Kārkōṭakēśvara temple.

summary.p: There is mix-up of two different inscriptions in this. The first five lines give a part of the meykkītti of Rājēndra I. The remaining lines (starting from the second half of line 5) form the actual document belonging to the time of Kulōttuṅga III (also known as Vīrarājēndra). The king made the village of Vīrarājēndra-nallūr measuring 52 and odd vēli as tax-free dēvabhōga to the Mahādēva temple of Tirunallūr. It is said that this village which should have been a part of Vikkiramachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu by some mistake was now lying as part of Kiḍāraṅgoṇḍachōḻavaḷanāḍu and on representation of the piḍāraṉ (a temple official) of the above temple, the king ordered for the restoration of the previous status of the village. Several officials are found to be involved in the transaction.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirumaṉṉivaḷara Iruṉila maṭantai tEviyarāki Iṉ neṭuntuyar Ūḻiyuḷ I
ṭaituṟaināṭum tuṭarvaṉavēlippaṭarva ṟaṇ maṇṇikkaṭakkamum porukaṭalīḻattaraiya
r tamuṭiyum Āṅkuvan tēvi vāṅkeḻi ntiranāramum tenticai Īḻamaṇṭalamuḻutum
Eṟipaṭaik kēraḷan muṟaimaiyiṟccūṭa tir vēlait tol peruṅkāvalar palapa
ḻantīvu māpperun taṇṭāṟ ko koṇṭa vīrarājēntiracōḻa tēvarkku yāṇṭu patin Ēḻā
vatu kaṅkaikoṇṭa cōḻapurattu Innā nāvi Avani muḻutuṭaiyā
ḷōṭu meḻuntaruḷi Irunta ceyya tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉa vikkiramacōḻa vaḷanāṭṭu viṟaik kūṟṟattu
ttu tirunallūr mahādevaṟkku devabhogamāna nilattilē Aimpattiraṇṭaraiyē mūṉṟu māni
māna kiṭāraṅkoṇṭa cōḻa vaḷanāṭṭilē Uḷpukka tenṟu Ikkōyiṟp piṭāraṉ Araṉaṉ paraṉparai villavar
l kiṭāraṅkoṇṭa cōḻavaḷanāṭṭi niṉṟu vēṟiṭṭu vikkirama cōḻa vaḷanāṭṭilēṟuḷḷa māṉamatu
kkuṭutta nilam m 3 100 3 ntam vīrarājēntira cōḻa nallūr Ūr neṟil nilam 2 10 9 kuṭutta nilam
kuṭutta nilam Aimpattiraṇṭaraiyē mūnṟumāvum patinēḻāvatu mutal devabhogamākak kāṇiyumiṟaiyiliy Ācantiratārakamākak kuṭuttōm Ippaṭi kuṭuppatē val rāja
neḻuttiṭṭup pukka ceyyumpaṭiyum puravari mukaveṭṭi tañcāvūr kiḻavaṉum vāṭi Uṭaiyāṉum matalaiūruṭaiyāṉum teṅkūruṭaiyāṉum puravari cikara ṇa nāyakam poṉṉūruṭai
yāṉum Ampaṟṟuḻaiyāṉum pantaṉai nallūruṭaiyāṉum Iḷaṅkāraku ṭaiyāṉum puravuvarikkūṟu vayalnāṭṭaraiyarum cittarāyamum maḻa rum kaḷappāḷarāyarum
Innilam Aimpattiraṇṭaraiyē mūṉṟumāvum patinēḻāvatu mutal devabhogamākak kāṇiyumiṟaiyiliyum Ācantiratārakamākat tirunallūri mahādevaṟkuk kuṭuttōm Ip
yilukkum ceyvatākavum Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvarippaṭikku Ikkōyililē kalveṭṭikkuṭukkap paṇṇuka Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantiraōlai Irācēntira ciṅka mūvēntavēḷāneḻuttu Ivai
veṭṭi nāyakam varakkai Uṭaiyāneḻuttu Ivai ta ntāruṭaiyāneḻuttu Ivai teṅkūruṭaiyāneḻuttu Ivai tañcāvūr kiḻavaneḻuttu van cikaraṇanāyakam
ṉuḻāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Ampaṟṟuḻaiyā neḻuttu Ivai paṉtaṉai nallūruṭaiyāneḻuttu Ivai Iḷaṅkārikuṭaiyāneḻuttu Ivai pu yyal nāṭṭuṭai
ḻuttu Ivaic cittarāyaneḻuttu Ivai maḻavarāyaneḻuttu Ivai kaḷappāḷarā yaneḻuttu Ivai paṉmāheśvara rakṣai ....
Digital edition of SII 34.61 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
